Worked in military units carrying out tasks to repel the armed aggression of the Russian Federation in the Oleksandrovsky direction. Heard the report of the commander of the Airborne Assault Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, Major General Oleg Apostol, about the situation in the area of ​​responsibility, the results of the work carried out and the implementation earlier...

Заслухав доповідь командувача Десантно-штурмових військ Збройних Сил України генерал-майора Олега Апостола про ситуацію в районі відповідальності, результати проведеної роботи та виконання раніше...

description: Putin is blackmailing Lukashenko, demanding that Belarus be drawn into the war — WSJ According to The Wall Street Journal, the Kremlin has increased pressure on the Bulbul Fuhrer and is demanding that the country's territory be provided for new operations against Ukraine. Among the scenarios considered by Moscow: constant launches of drones from the territory of Belarus, requests to expand the front line and force Ukraine to transfer part of its reserves from...
description_en: Putin is blackmailing Lukashenko, demanding that Belarus be drawn into the war — WSJ According to The Wall Street Journal, the Kremlin has increased pressure on the Bulbul Fuhrer and is demanding that the country's territory be provided for new operations against Ukraine. Among the scenarios considered by Moscow: constant launches of drones from the territory of Belarus, requests to expand the front line and force Ukraine to transfer part of its reserves from...
description_uk: путин шантажирует Лукашенко, требуя втянуть Беларусь в войну, — WSJ По данным The Wall Street Journal, кремль усилил давление на бульбофюрера и требует предоставить территорию страны для новых операций против Украины. Среди сценариев, которые рассматривает москва: постоянные запуски дронов с территории Беларуси, попытки расширить линию фронта и заставить Украину перебросить часть резервов с...

title: Sevastopol: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich...
title_en: Sevastopol: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich...

description: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich Russian program. In Orenburg, a drone flew over a gas processing plant - local correspondents counted several arrivals and fires at once. Balaklavskaya TPP, which provides electricity to Sevastopol, is burning in occupied Crimea. It is also reported about fires near the "Gvardeyskoe" airfield, from where Russian aircraft launch...
description_en: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich Russian program. In Orenburg, a drone flew over a gas processing plant - local correspondents counted several arrivals and fires at once. Balaklavskaya TPP, which provides electricity to Sevastopol, is burning in occupied Crimea. It is also reported about fires near the "Gvardeyskoe" airfield, from where Russian aircraft launch...
description_uk: «Вот это, нахй, война интересная»: ночью дроны устроили русне насыщенную программу В Оренбурге прилетело по газоперерабатывающему заводу — местные корреспонденты насчитали сразу несколько прилетов и очагов возгорания. В оккупированном Крыму горит Балаклавская ТЭС, которая обеспечивает электричеством Севастополь. Также сообщается о пожарах возле аэродрома «Гвардейское», откуда русня запускает...

title: Kyiv: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2...
title_en: Kyiv: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2...
title_uk: Київ: Україна повернула 42 дитини з окупованої РФ території за 2...
description: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2 weeks. "Thousands of children remain trapped under occupation, where they are forced to forget their roots and are openly being prepared for war. But we will not stop," Save Ukraine, a Ukrainian humanitarian NGO, said in a June 23 statement on social media.
description_en: Ukraine brings back 42 children from Russian-occupied territory in 2 weeks. "Thousands of children remain trapped under occupation, where they are forced to forget their roots and are openly being prepared for war. But we will not stop," Save Ukraine, a Ukrainian humanitarian NGO, said in a June 23 statement on social media.

title: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...
title_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...
title_uk: Він провів зустріч з Генеральним секретарем Організації з...
description: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_uk: Провів зустріч із генеральним секретарем Організації економічного співробітництва та розвитку Матіасом Корманом. Членство України в ОЕСР для нас дуже важливе. І сьогодні робимо крок в цьому напрямі: Прем’єр-міністр передала ОЕСР офіційну поновлену заявку України на членство. Сподіваємось отримати статус країни-кандидата вже цієї осені. Наступний етап – дорожня карта до членства в ОЕСР. Обговорили...

description: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia assault regiment, Ukrainian media investigation finds. The deaths, which occurred shortly after mobilization and training, have prompted allegations from relatives and former servicemen of inadequate medical care and, in some cases, physical abuse within the unit.
description_en: At least 26 noncombat deaths, alleged abuse reported in Skelia assault regiment, Ukrainian media investigation finds. title: Today is the 32nd anniversary of the Special Operations Center...

description: Today is the 32nd anniversary of the Special Operations Center "Alpha" of the Security Service of Ukraine, and I am grateful to you for the fact that every year you add strength to the Center, the Security Service of Ukraine, and our entire state. Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...
description_en: Today is the 32nd anniversary of the Special Operations Center "Alpha" of the Security Service of Ukraine, and I am grateful to you for the fact that every year you add strength to the Center, the Security Service of Ukraine, and our entire state. Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...
description_uk: Сьогодні вже 32 роки Центру спеціальних операцій «Альфа» Служби безпеки України, і я вдячний вам за те, що кожного року ви додаєте сили і Центру, і Службі безпеки України, і всій нашій державі. Відзначив державними нагородами воїнів ЦСО «А» СБУ та передав нагороду родині загиблого Героя, удостоєного цього звання посмертно. Служба безпеки України за роки нашого повномасштабного захисту стала...

title: The situation in the Liman area ℹ️ Recently, there have been many...
title_en: The situation in the Liman area ℹ️ Recently, there have been many...
title_uk: Ситуація в районі Лиману ℹ️ Останнім часом багато...
description: The situation in the Liman area ℹ️ Recently, there have been many discussions and questions about the Liman. In particular, we are talking about fixation of lesions in the eastern part of the city, which logically leads to the conclusion that katsaps are seeping there. Increased activity on the city continues for some time, and given the successes of the Muscovites in Kostyantynivka, Liman is becoming an increasingly relevant target. And the quantitative advantage is small...
description_en: The situation in the Liman area ℹ️ Recently, there have been many discussions and questions about the Liman. In particular, we are talking about fixation of lesions in the eastern part of the city, which logically leads to the conclusion that katsaps are seeping there. Increased activity on the city continues for some time, and given the successes of the Muscovites in Kostyantynivka, Liman is becoming an increasingly relevant target. And the quantitative advantage is small...
description_uk: Ситуація в районі Лиману ℹ️ Останнім часом багато обговорень та запитань лунає щодо Лиману. Зокрема, йдеться про фіксації уражень в східній частині міста, що логічно виводить на висновки, що кацапи туди просочуються. Підвищена активність на місто триває протягом певного часу, а враховуючи успіхи московитів на Костянтинівці, Лиман стає все більш актуальною ціллю. А кількісна перевага та мала...
